name: Window Details - Head, Jamb, and Sill
description: Three related details showing window installation in wood-frame wall. Each is a separate drafting view. Use batchDrawDetail for all three.

wallType.note: Use getTypeAssembly to read actual wall layers

head.name: Window Head Detail
head.description: Horizontal section at top of window showing header, flashing, and drip edge

conceptualLayout.note: Section looking up. Exterior at top, interior at bottom.
layers_top_to_bottom: Head flashing - bent metal or self-adhered membrane lapping over WRB
Header beam (doubled 2x_ or LVL, per span table)
Cripple studs above header to top plate

criticalItems: Head flashing MUST lap over WRB below
Header size per IRC Table R602.7 (span dependent)
1/4" min gap at frame top for shimming

jamb.name: Window Jamb Detail
jamb.description: Vertical section at side of window showing frame, sealant, and trim

conceptualLayout.note: Section looking down at jamb. Exterior at left, interior at right (or vice versa).

criticalItems: WRB wraps into rough opening min 2"
Sealant at exterior, no sealant at interior (weep path)
Shims at 12" OC, min 2 per jamb
Jack stud (trimmer) full height of opening

sill.name: Window Sill Detail
sill.description: Horizontal section at bottom of window showing sill pan, slope, and flashing

conceptualLayout.note: Section cut through sill. Exterior at top, interior at bottom. CRITICAL DETAIL - #1 leak point.
layers_top_to_bottom: Sill pan flashing (slope 1/4" per foot min to exterior)

criticalItems: SILL PAN IS MANDATORY - #1 leak source in buildings
Sill must slope to exterior (1/4" per foot minimum)
End dams on sill pan turned up min 1" at jambs
Back dam turned up min 2" at interior
Weep holes at exterior - do NOT seal bottom of frame
Sealant at sides and top of frame only, NOT at sill bottom
annotations: SILL PAN FLASHING - SLOPE TO EXT.
DO NOT SEAL BOTTOM OF FRAME

svgTemplate.note: For AI-generated SVG approach. The AI can modify this template SVG for specific conditions.
svgTemplate.head_svg_hint: Draw as horizontal cross-section. Wall layers vertical, window frame as U-shape opening downward, flashing as angled line above frame.
svgTemplate.jamb_svg_hint: Draw as plan cross-section. Wall layers horizontal, window frame as vertical U-shape, sealant as thin line between frame and wall.
svgTemplate.sill_svg_hint: Draw as horizontal cross-section. Wall layers vertical, sill pan as angled line (slope!), window frame as U-shape opening upward, stool extends beyond frame interior.

connections.wallAssembly: Inherits wall layers from wall-section template. Use getTypeAssembly for actual wall.
connections.note: Each detail shows the wall assembly in section with the window component inserted. The wall layers are interrupted by the rough opening.
